opportunities.specific_product: Twin XL dorm comforter set with matching shams and decorative pillows
opportunities.transformation_hook: Bare college dorm to Pinterest bedroom for under $45
opportunities.before_state: Blank white-walled dorm with standard-issue mattress, zero personality, fluorescent lighting vibe
opportunities.after_state: Colorful, cozy, coordinated bedroom that looks curated — bedding, pillows, and decor in one pull
opportunities.why_now: June marks the opening of college back-to-school shopping, and Apartment Therapy is actively pinning IKEA-driven dorm makeover content, signaling mainstream aesthetic appetite peaking right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Pet-hair disaster couch to brand-new look for $55 — no furniture shopping
opportunities.before_state: Stained, pet-hair-saturated rental couch that is an embarrassment in every wide shot
opportunities.after_state: Crisp, fitted, waterproof slipcover that looks intentional and hides every sin underneath
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is pinning multiple rental apartment makeovers where the explicit constraint is avoiding new furniture purchases — direct pipeline to slipcover buying intent.

opportunities.specific_product: Solar-powered outdoor LED string lights with vintage Edison bulbs
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dead backyard to 4th of July party space for $29
opportunities.before_state: Dark, bare deck or patio with no ambient lighting — unusable after sunset, zero curb appeal
opportunities.after_state: Warm, glowing outdoor entertaining space draped in Edison lights, ready for summer nights and holiday gatherings
opportunities.why_now: HGTV Pinterest is running a concentrated burst of 4th of July and outdoor entertaining content today, and with the holiday 23 days out, buyer urgency is at its sharpest point in the purchase window.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia silicone kitchen utensil set with holder
opportunities.transformation_hook: Junky mismatched kitchen drawer to chef-ready setup for $32
opportunities.before_state: Overcrowded drawer stuffed with scratched, mismatched utensils that melt, warp, and slow down every recipe
opportunities.after_state: Color-coordinated silicone set in a countertop holder — camera-ready kitchen that makes summer cooking content look professional
opportunities.why_now: BHG and Real Simple are both pushing summer recipe content (street corn dip, iced coffee at home, grilling) today, activating purchase intent for the tools needed to execute those recipes.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products entryway bench with shoe cubby and wall hooks
opportunities.transformation_hook: Chaotic front door dump zone to organized entryway for $79
opportunities.before_state: Shoes avalanching by the door, coats over railings, bags on the floor — first impression is pure chaos
opportunities.after_state: Clean, functional mudroom-style entry with dedicated shoe cubbies, coat hooks, and a place to sit
opportunities.why_now: HGTV is actively pinning mudroom and entryway makeover content today, and early summer back-to-school prep pushes parents to organize high-traffic home entry zones before fall.
